--- is_source_where.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
MATCH (a)-[e]->(b)
WHERE a IS SOURCE OF e
RETURN a.id

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    15,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  21,
                          Rparen:  23,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 22,
                              NameEnd: 23,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  24,
                          EndPos:    30,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 26,
                              NameEnd: 27,
                              Name:    "e",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  30,
                          Rparen:  32,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 31,
                              NameEnd: 32,
                              Name:    "b",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
              Where: &ast.Where{
                Where: 34,
                Expr:  &ast.IsSourceExpr{
                  Of:   52,
                  Left: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 40,
                    NameEnd: 41,
                    Name:    "a",
                  },
                  Right: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 55,
                    NameEnd: 56,
                    Name:    "e",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 57,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Path{
                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 64,
                      NameEnd: 65,
                      Name:    "a",
                    },
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 66,
                      NameEnd: 68,
                      Name:    "id",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (a)-[e]->(b) WHERE a IS SOURCE OF e RETURN a.id
